title: DD Autocorr Exp
summary: Demo notebook for the DD Autocorrelation Excess Analysis experiment. Loads 50 pre-computed treebank results (24 language families, 4 word orders, spoken+written) from mini_demo_data.json. Runs DerSimonian-Laird random-effects meta-analysis across three baselines (RPL/FHD/SOP), language-level sensitivity analysis, OLS and mixed-effects typological regression (spoken vs. written, case morphology), and generates forest plots. Demonstrates strong negative excess autocorrelation (pooled RPL=-0.139, p=2e-127) with hierarchy |RPL|>|FHD|>|SOP| and spoken-written difference (Cohen's d=-0.843).
